message:
🐛 Fix AgentBackendSettings empty state and redundant button guards (Fixes #10480) (#10486)

- Add empty state message when kagent/kagenti is selected but no agents found
- Remove redundant onClick guards on disabled buttons (disabled prop already prevents clicks)
- Internationalize all hardcoded strings with i18n keys

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>

files.patch:
